name: Dr. Meera Kapoor
bio: Dr. Meera Kapoor directs the Semantic Search Lab where she builds retrieval-augmented systems that combine dense vector search with structured knowledge graphs. Her group developed an open-source framework for entity-linking overlong legal documents and a real-time question-answering system deployed at a national judicial portal. Her current work focuses on query intent decomposition for multi-hop reasoning and hybrid sparse-dense retrieval architectures. She regularly organizes shared tasks on legal information extraction at top IR conferences.
